calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:28AM: This cause comes on as regularly scheduled this day for Trial de Novo; Respondent Michael Bernavage appears in propria persona; Appellant Mr. Jophrey Yves-Bishop also appears in propria persona this day. Both sides stipulate to the Pro Tem Judge hearing the matter this date.

11:30AM: The Court commences to hear oral testimony by both sides and additionally receives, reads and reviews documentary evidence that is presented by both sides.

11:57AM: The Court takes the matter under submission and informs parties they will be notified by mail.

PTJ Elliott A. Myles; not reported; Clerk Marjorie Manzella (D-525).
